author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: gelu_f32/f64, gelu_erf_f32/f64, gelu_tanh_f32/f64, tanh_f32/f64, silu_f32/f64, mish_f32/f64, elu_f32/f64. Plus their backward passes: gelu_backward_f32/f64, gelu_backward_erf_f32/f64, gelu_backward_tanh_f32/f64, tanh_backward_f32/f64, silu_backward_f32/f64, mish_backward_f32/f64, elu_backward_f32/f64. MSL kernels in src/kernels/activations_extra_f32.metal.
